message:
fix(engine): dead code removal, case-insensitive suffixes, VmError serialization, and flow correctness

Five targeted fixes across the engine source:

1. baseline_interpreter.rs: Remove unused test_module_with_caps() helper
   that was orphaned after earlier test refactoring.

2. franken_lockstep_runner.rs: Normalize executable suffixes to lowercase
   via to_ascii_lowercase(), preventing case-sensitive mismatch on
   case-insensitive filesystems (e.g. ".EXE" vs ".exe").

3. bytecode_vm.rs: Handle unit-variant VmError serialization — serde may
   serialize unit enum variants as bare strings rather than objects, so
   the test now checks for both representations instead of panicking.

4. flow_envelope.rs: Add missing assertion on cloned envelope_epoch to
   verify the clone actually carries the mutated value (was testing only
   the original remained unchanged).

5. flow_lattice.rs: Sign the DeclassificationReceipt before use — the
   test was passing an unsigned receipt to use_declassification_with_receipt,
   which should fail signature verification. Now correctly signs the receipt
   with the test signing key.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
